title: Warehouse Management and Correction Workflows
shortDescription: Operational dashboards and guided workflows that improved fulfillment accuracy, throughput, and correction timing.
problem: Distribution work depended on tribal knowledge, disconnected order data, and reactive correction after errors had already affected shipments.
solution: Built a custom warehouse management and operational dashboard system that surfaced order, picking, routing, and fulfillment issues before they became shipment failures.
impact: Improved order accuracy from 97% to 99.7% in 3 months
Increased shipment capacity from 1,800 to 4,200 shipments per day
Identified $634k annual incorrect-order overnight shipping exposure

title: Orbit Controlled Document Viewer
shortDescription: Controlled-access document workflow connecting production users to approved source documents.
problem: Production teams needed reliable access to the right approved source documents without relying on uncontrolled local copies or manual searches.
solution: Developed Orbit, an internal controlled-access document viewer that connects production context to approved documents from systems such as Windchill and Grand Avenue.
impact: Reduced risk from uncontrolled local document copies
Improved consistency of production document access
Created reusable lookup and validation patterns for future tools

title: AI-Assisted Internal Development Patterns
shortDescription: Reusable AI/development skills, prompt frameworks, and implementation templates for faster internal software delivery.
problem: Internal workflow ideas were slow to turn into working tools because each project repeated discovery, scaffolding, documentation, and implementation decisions.
solution: Created reusable prompt frameworks, custom AI/development skills, agent-style task patterns, React interface patterns, and Python service patterns to move from prototype to usable workflow faster.
impact: Improved consistency across Starkey internal tools
Created repeatable patterns for workflow design, documentation support, and implementation

title: Validation Graphing and Research Tools
shortDescription: Data tools that shortened validation documentation and surfaced calculation errors.
problem: Validation documentation required manual graphing and review work that consumed engineering time and hid calculation issues until late in the process.
solution: Built graphing and mapping software for research and validation teams, turning manual analysis steps into reusable data workflows.
impact: Reduced documentation time from 8 weeks to 4 weeks
Gave engineering teams more time for software stabilization

title: MES-Style Manufacturing and Electronic Traveler Tools
shortDescription: Manufacturing workflows that connected job metadata, approved documents, and production execution.
problem: Manufacturing execution relied on paper travelers, local document copies, and manual interpretation of job context.
solution: Built MES-style internal tools and an electronic traveler workflow that connected job metadata to approved source documents and guided production work.
impact: Standardized workflow behavior across internal tools

title: Program and Project Management Platform
shortDescription: Shared program information, dashboards, task accountability, and automated reporting built on Microsoft Power Platform.
problem: Program information was duplicated across spreadsheets, leading to outdated status, inconsistent reporting, and manual leadership updates.
solution: Built custom program and project management tools using Power Platform and Dataverse to centralize program information and automate leadership reporting.
impact: Reduced duplicate and outdated spreadsheet information
Created dashboards for task accountability and leadership updates
